title: MAKE Webhook "Failed to communicate with URL provided"
excerpt:
whatever i try, I’m not able to set a webhook with Make.com (formerly Integromat) and get this error “Failed to communicate with URL provided”. I do receive a confirmation in make.com. 
 
we tried also to change the webh…

posts.author: peppinob (Giuseppe)
posts.cookedHtml:
whatever i try, I’m not able to set a webhook with Make.com (formerly Integromat) and get this error “Failed to communicate with URL provided”. I do receive a confirmation in make.com.

we tried also to change the webhook settings, and tried with various MDC accounts and boards

image952×1270 167 KB

are you having the same trouble?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@peppinob

The easiest way around this is to use the monday module “Watch Events”. This is the monday specific webhook module. Not sure why they didn’t just call it “monday Webhook”.

Jim - The Monday Man (YouTube Channel)
Watch Our Latest Video: Column Total in monday.com Formulas? YES!!!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@peppinob

LOL, or go to the post @basdebruin referred to.

posts.author: peppinob (Giuseppe)
posts.cookedHtml:
@JCorrell
@basdebruin
Thank you both for your guidance, “Watch Events” works as expected. We are also having trouble with others issues listed by Jim in the post, in particular with mapping IDS.
I also submitted the issues to MAKE team.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
